title: Airtel India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Airtel India Capital India is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Airtel India Capital India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Full Stack Developer for our Patna operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Airtel India Capital India:
Airtel India Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in Java

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Life and accident insurance
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Airtel India Capital India!
